description_long: This is a compact shotgun with a short barrel and a wooden pistol grip, designed for close-quarters use. The main body and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with a ribbed pump-action fore-end made of a synthetic or polymer material. The wooden grip is smoothly contoured and stained a reddish-brown, contrasting with the matte black finish of the receiver and barrel. The shotgun features a tubular magazine running parallel beneath the barrel, and the pump mechanism is visibly grooved for improved grip. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A short-barreled, pump-action shotgun with a wooden pistol grip, dark metal body, and ribbed fore-end. Its compact design and robust materials make it suitable for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden pistol grip, ribbed pump, and dual metal tubes.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the grip and pump beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the wooden grip and pump clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the end of the receiver, with the pump and barrel aligned above.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with tubular magazine beneath; no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
